title: Trees, Traversals, and Binary Search Trees · Structure Brief: Bst Invariant
summary: Index hierarchical records and ordered keys with explicit structural invariants. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa bst invariant increment in a traversable search tree with validity checks. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Preserve a documented duplicate policy and global ordering invariant during updates.
Implement preorder, inorder, postorder, and level-order traversal iteratively and recursively.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
